author: Space Pirate Zero
title: Digital Insurgency
description: Business × cyberpunk × spec-ops. A survival guide for digital insurgents operating behind enterprise lines — The Trojan Horse Protocol, the MBA Efficiency Paradox, and how to smuggle the future past the corporate immune system. A companion 30-day dispatch series runs on Substack.
summary: The counterfeit world, mapped as a field manual for the ones fighting it. Case studies in banking and healthcare; the Theater Ratio and Vendor Gravity Force made concrete.

author: Space Pirate Zero
title: The Last Human CEO
description: A tragic dark comedy, narrated by Space Pirate Zero. In 2027, as corporate boards swap their CEOs for cheaper, scandal-proof AI, the last human chief executive in the Fortune 100 wages a manic crusade to prove a person still belongs in the chair — right up until the machine taking his job quietly uncovers the thing he buried that got two people killed.
summary: A full-cast audiobook in 29 episodes (~12.6h). Succession meets Flowers for Algernon, by way of a Twilight Zone broadcast. Streaming now on Apple Podcasts and Spotify; on Kindle and Amazon.

author: Space Pirate Zero
title: Defense Against the Dark Arts
description: A training class for the general public in the dark arts of influence. Thirteen modules teach how manipulation actually works — cold reading, gaslighting and DARVO, the liar's dividend, radicalization funnels, astroturf, deepfakes — how to see each move coming, how to defuse it, and how to stay free.
summary: Nonfiction field course in 14 episodes, narrated by Space Pirate Zero. Coming soon.

author: Space Pirate Zero
title: The Maneki Neko Death Cult
description: Twenty-four doors of an Advent calendar of death — each a dead-artist 'saint,' each a jump to another era and city, each a Twilight-Zone fable. A scored, serialized audio drama in three acts: The Fog, The Mastery, The Refusal. Space Pirate Zero is the time-slipper who burns himself down to jump.
summary: A fully produced 24-episode scored audio drama (~10.5h). Coming soon.
